channel.title: Huawei Technologies — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Huawei Technologies (huawei).

item.title: CVE-2026-41970 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Out-of-bounds write vulnerability in the distributed file system module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-41969 · 6.2 MEDIUM
item.description: Permission control vulnerability in the projection module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-41968 · 5.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Permission control vulnerability in the manufacturability design module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-41967 · 5.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Permission control vulnerability in the manufacturability design module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-41966 · 5.6 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Permission control vulnerability in the smart sensing service. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-41962 · 3.6 LOW
item.description: Permission control vulnerability in the app management and control module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-41961 · 5.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Permission control vulnerability in contacts. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-41960 · 5.8 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Permission control vulnerability in calls. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-41971 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Permission control vulnerability in the security control module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-41965 · 5.6 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Use-After-Free (UAF) vulnerability in the web. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-41963 · 2.8 LOW
item.description: Stack overflow vulnerability in the media platform. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-41964 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: Permission control vulnerability in the web. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-34866 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Out-of-bounds write vulnerability in the WEB module.Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability will affect availability and confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-34865 · 10 CRITICAL 🌩️
item.description: Out-of-bounds write vulnerability in the WEB module.Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability will affect availability and confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-34864 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Boundary-unlimited vulnerability in the application read module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-34863 · 6.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Out-of-bounds write vulnerability in the file system. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-34862 · 6.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Race condition vulnerability in the power consumption statistics module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-34861 · 6.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Race condition vulnerability in the thermal management module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-34859 · 5.9 MEDIUM
item.description: UAF vulnerability in the kernel module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability will affect availability and confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-34858 · 4.1 MEDIUM
item.description: UAF vulnerability in the communication module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-34857 · 4.7 MEDIUM
item.description: UAF vulnerability in the communication module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-34855 · 5.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Out-of-bounds write vulnerability in the kernel module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability will affect availability and confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-34854 · 5.7 MEDIUM
item.description: UAF vulnerability in the kernel module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability will affect availability and confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-34849 · 2.5 LOW
item.description: UAF vulnerability in the screen management module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-34856 · 7.3 HIGH
item.description: UAF vulnerability in the communication module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-34853 · 7.7 HIGH
item.description: Permission bypass vulnerability in the LBS module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-28553 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Vulnerability of improper permission control in the theme setting module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-34867 · 5.6 MEDIUM
item.description: Double free vulnerability in the multi-mode input system. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-34860 · 4.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Access control vulnerability in the memo module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability will affect availability and confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-34852 · 6.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Stack overflow vulnerability in the media platform. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-34851 · 2.2 LOW
item.description: Race condition vulnerability in the event notification module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-34850 · 1.9 LOW
item.description: Race condition vulnerability in the notification service. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-28542 · 7.3 HIGH
item.description: Permission bypass vulnerability in the system service framework. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-28548 · 7.1 HIGH
item.description: Vulnerability of improper verification in the email application. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-28551 · 4.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Race condition vulnerability in the device security management module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-28549 · 6.6 MEDIUM
item.description: Race condition vulnerability in the permission management service. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-28547 · 6.8 MEDIUM
item.description: Vulnerability of uninitialized pointer access in the scanning module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-28546 · 5.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Buffer overflow vulnerability in the scanning module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-28543 · 4.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Race condition vulnerability in the maintenance and diagnostics module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-28541 · 4 MEDIUM
item.description: Permission control vulnerability in the cellular_data module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-28540 · 4 MEDIUM
item.description: Out-of-bounds character read vulnerability in Bluetooth. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-28539 · 6.2 MEDIUM
item.description: Data processing vulnerability in the certificate management module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service confidentiality.

item.title: CVE-2026-28538 · 5.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Path traversal vulnerability in the certificate management module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2025-66319 · 3.3 LOW
item.description: Permission control vulnerability in the resource scheduling module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect service integrity.

item.title: CVE-2026-28552 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Out-of-bounds write vulnerability in the IMS module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-28550 · 4 MEDIUM
item.description: Race condition vulnerability in the security control module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-28545 · 5.9 MEDIUM
item.description: Race condition vulnerability in the printing module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-28544 · 6.2 MEDIUM
item.description: Race condition vulnerability in the printing module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-28537 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Double free vulnerability in the window module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability may affect availability.

item.title: CVE-2026-28536 · 9.6 CRITICAL
item.description: Authentication bypass vulnerability in the device authentication module. Impact: Successful exploitation of this vulnerability will affect integrity and confidentiality.
